summary: Language-URL Sync Feature - Complete testing of translated URL navigation and language auto-detection. All 10 test cases passed (100%). The feature correctly syncs language selection with URL paths for Paris Airport Transfer, VTC 7/8 Places, and Nice Airport Transfer pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language-URL sync feature fully functional. CityTransferPage.js uses two useEffect hooks: one detects language from URL on mount (lines 68-80), another navigates when language changes (lines 83-93). The seoUrls prop maps language codes to URL paths. All canonical URLs correctly use https://www.zont.cab (with www).

paris_airport_transfer: TEST 2: Switch FR→EN changes URL to /paris-airport-transfer ✓
TEST 3: Switch EN→RU changes URL to /taksi-iz-aeroporta-parij ✓
TEST 4: Direct navigation to /taksi-iz-aeroporta-parij auto-sets Russian ✓
vtc_pages: TEST 5b: Switch FR→EN changes URL to /vtc-8-seats ✓
TEST 6b: Switch FR→EN changes URL to /vtc-7-seats ✓
nice_airport_transfer: TEST 8b: Switch FR→EN changes URL to /nice-airport-transfer ✓
home_page: TEST 9: Home page title changes with language switch ✓
